_comment: Copy this file to config.json (gitignored) or let the app create it on first 'Save defaults'. Missing keys fall back to src/app_config.py defaults.
_comment_tailnet_host: tailnet_host is the Tailscale (MagicDNS) hostname of this PC, e.g. 'pc.example-tailnet.ts.net'. The Apps tab builds each running app's remote URL as <scheme>://<tailnet_host>:<port>/ (http vs https auto-detected per app) so you can tap it open from the phone. Leave it empty to disable the Open button.
